title: harvest_file_v1 — manifest contract for harvesting an on-disk layer file
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='harvest_file'. The action resolves a layer_key (declared in layers.registry.json with source=file) plus the per-layer template args (sample_id / K / cohort / win_bp / step_bp / etc.) against master_config roots, copies the matched file into raw_results/diversity/{action_id}/, and emits the layer envelope by dispatching to the matching extractor.

layer_key.description: A key declared in atlases/diversity/registries/data/layers.registry.json with source=file. Dispatch fails if the key is missing or has a non-file source.

args.description: Template-fill args for the layer's path_under_root. Required keys depend on the layer's placeholders.

params.description: Optional extractor params (override defaults declared in extractors.registry.json).
